# Free Resume Builder — No Paywall, No Tricks

> Build a professional resume for free. No email required. No account. No paywall.

## Description

A fully free, open-access resume builder that lets job seekers create and download
professional, ATS-friendly resumes as PDFs without hitting a paywall or sign-up wall.
Unlike Zety and similar tools that lock PDF downloads behind subscriptions, this tool
delivers the full experience — build, preview, download — at zero cost.

## Features

- 5 ATS-friendly resume templates (Modern, Classic, Minimal, Creative, Executive)
- Real-time PDF preview as you type
- Instant PDF download — no account required
- No email capture, no paywall, no hidden fees
- Dark mode support
- Responsive design — works on desktop and mobile
- Export to PDF in one click
- Pre-filled example resume for quick start

## URL

https://free-resume-builder-no-paywall-no-tricks.usetools.dev
